{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/161313621?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Mouhebbenelwafi/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Mouhebbenelwafi/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Mouhebbenelwafi/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Mouhebbenelwafi/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Mouhebbenelwafi", "id": 161313621, "login": "Mouhebbenelwafi", "node_id": "U_kgDOCZ1zVQ", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Mouhebbenelwafi/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Mouhebbenelwafi/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Mouhebbenelwafi/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Mouhebbenelwafi/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Mouhebbenelwafi/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Mouhebbenelwafi", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-47385", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:L/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-22", "name": "Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')"}], "description": "### Summary
An authenticated user with base-create permission can attach a SQLite source pointing at
an arbitrary file on the NocoDB host, including NocoDB's own internal databases.

### Details
The SQLite client and the base/integration create services accepted a caller-supplied
filename and passed it to `fs.exists` and `fs.open('w')` without restricting the location.
A user could point a source at `noco.db`, at a tenant database under `nc_minimal_dbs/`,
or at any writable path the NocoDB process can reach, and then read or overwrite its
contents through the regular table APIs.

### Impact
Disclosure and modification of NocoDB internal state, of other tenants' databases, and
of any file the NocoDB process can read or write. Authentication and base-create
permission are required.

### Credit
This issue was reported by [@Mouhebbenelwafi](https://github.com/Mouhebbenelwafi).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00324, "percentile": 0.24512}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-wvqj-9wv4-7ff5", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-05T16:20:20Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wvqj-9wv4-7ff5", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-wvqj-9wv4-7ff5"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-47385"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-05T16:20:20Z", "references": ["https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb/security/advisories/GHSA-wvqj-9wv4-7ff5", "https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb/releases/tag/2026.05.1", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wvqj-9wv4-7ff5"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nocodb/nocodb/security-advisories/GHSA-wvqj-9wv4-7ff5", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb", "summary": "NocoDB: Path Traversal via SQLite Source Filename", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-05T16:20:22Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-wvqj-9wv4-7ff5", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.05.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "nocodb"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2026.05.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: NocoDB: Path Traversal via SQLite Source Filename
